video_details.title: The 24/7 Trading & Tokenization Revolution Will Change Everything | Alex Paley Interview
video_details.description:
I sat down with Alex Paley, co-founder of Rift, to talk about something most traders haven't fully wrapped their heads around yet: 24/7 tokenized trading is already here. Alex comes from a fascinating background in mobile gaming and crypto, and has now built a platform backed by Sequoia, Andreessen Horowitz, and Jump Trading that lets you trade stocks, futures, commodities, and crypto from your phone at any hour of the day. 

We got into the real mechanics of perpetual futures, atomic settlement, and why platforms like Hyperliquid are already being watched by hedge funds for price discovery on oil and silver over the weekend when traditional markets are closed. We also tackled the harder questions around regulation, insider trading, wallet tracking, and what 24/7 markets actually mean for your quality of life as a trader.

ABOUT ME

If you’re new to my channel, my name is Lance Breitstein. I spent over a decade trading equities at Trillium, setting the record for the highest PNL in a single year as their Top Trader. I trained dozens of traders to become successes while managing Trillium’s Chicago office. With over $100m in verified profits, I now spend my time focused on turning good traders into greats and greats into GOATs. Advisor to SMB Capital and mentor of 7- and 8-figure PER YEAR traders. I am to be profiled in the next edition of Jack Schwager’s Market Wizards.

The journey is never easy. Trading is one of the most difficult, but most rewarding jobs imaginable. I am here to help you on your path, wherever that leads you.

May you want it bad enough to overcome any obstacles.
-(The One) Lance B
